# MUmu模拟器配置
### 1. 模拟器下载 [官方下载](https://mumu.163.com/)
### 2. -[github-KitsuneMagisk](https://github.com/Jordan231111/KitsuneMagisk/releases/download/v31.0-25fa2159/app-release.apk)
###    - [xget加速-KitsuneMagisk](https://xget.xi-xu.me/gh/Jordan231111/KitsuneMagisk/releases/download/v31.0-25fa2159/app-release.apk)
###    - [Lanzou-Kitsune Magisk](https://slssm.dmpdmp.com/file/?)

### 3. 打开 Magisk – 设置 – 开启 Zygisk
### 4. 打开 Magisk，模块 – 从本地安装
